command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup

echo "=== DEPLOY v2 LOADER ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > runtime/agent_identity_loader.py
echo "Written: $(wc -l runtime/agent_identity_loader.py) lines"

echo ""
echo "=== --list ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --list

echo ""
echo "=== --show sakura ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --show sakura

echo ""
echo "=== --all ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --all

echo ""
echo "=== --validate remy ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --validate remy

echo ""
echo "=== AUDIT RECORDS ==="
ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/ | grep identity | head -8
